reviews.review_description: All in Chinese, what's the way to set English language? If no way to set English language please turn back my money, full refund (you say English language at description). I have Spanish language in my phone, and after reading your reply still no way to use English language at Mirror. Please add option to the choose language, only Chinese!!! How can I contact you?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your advice， I'm sorry to have troubled you. The language of the game is based on the language you set in your phone, you can try. If you have any questions, welcome to communicate with us again.

reviews.review_description: I enjoy this type of game, but it goes so slow, from the start, your standing infront of a mirror, then a man is standing behind you and then SLOWLY questions show up for minutes each and thats all the further I got bc I totally lost interest waiting for the game to start! Am i doing something wrong?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support， I'm sorry to have troubled you.You can click touch pad lightly to accelerate the game story text.If you have any questions, welcome to communicate with us again.

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately the game is so buggy and almost broken for me!

developer_response.body: Please list specific questions, we will continue to optimize it, thank you.

reviews.review_description: I like the game so far but I need help to get out of the first room.

reviews.review_title: Great, but controls are a little weird
reviews.review_description: I just finished the game and all of the puzzles were super easy but fun. It was finding patterns and clues to escape that were a little challenging, but that's what made it fun and exciting when I did figure something out. My only complaint is in how hard it was to grab some items. You have to be standing in a certain position to grab anything, and sometimes because of that you don't even notice that you can pick up an item because a hand only pops up if you're intent on grabbing it. Besides that, it was a short but fun game. I liked how there wasn't too much dialog/story, and that it was almost entirely puzzle and problem solving. I hope to see more similar to this in the future!
